_comment: Canonical flag registry. Every flagKey used across all chapters must appear here. This is the source of truth for QA, narrative design, and any future server-side flag persistence. flagValue in scenes is ADDITIVE — never a hard set.

flags.label: Ruthless
flags.description: Incremented by choices that favour force, intimidation, or immediate cost over diplomacy. High values shift Mitsuhide grief scenes and Ch8 endings.

flags.label: Political
flags.description: Incremented by choices that favour leverage, patience, and institutional power over direct action. Affects Ch6 Nohime council scenes.

flags.label: Mitsuhide Loyalty
flags.description: Tracks Mitsuhide's accumulated loyalty delta. Negative values unlock cold-path variants in Ch4 (S09_WIN_COLD, S09_LOSE_COLD). Critical threshold for Ch8 Honnoji branching.

flags.label: Supernatural
flags.description: Incremented by choices that engage with omen, ritual, or fate over material strategy. Affects Ch5 Kenshin mirror scene variants.

flags.label: Battle Won
flags.description: Cumulative battle win counter across all chapters. Not currently used for branching but tracked for end-of-game stats.

flags.label: Battle Lost
flags.description: Cumulative battle loss counter across all chapters.

flags.label: Nohime Trust
flags.description: Tracks accumulated trust with Nohime. Affects Ch6 Nohime gambit scene depth and available choices. High values unlock the Ch6 private council variant.

flags.label: Kennyo Enmity
flags.description: Tracks escalation of the Nobunaga/Kennyo conflict. High values compress Ch4 diplomatic options and expand the violence path in Ch7.

flags.label: Nohime Witnessed Victory
flags.description: Set to 1 when Nohime is present during a battle win in Ch3 (S07B_WIN). Used by the Ch3 chapter-end scene narrator beat comparing Yoshitatsu's speed to Nobunaga's. Not displayed in FlagBar during normal play.

flags.label: Nohime Witnessed Defeat
flags.description: Set to 1 when Nohime rides beside Nobunaga during a Ch3 retreat (S07B_LOSE). Informs the emotional register of Ch3 chapter-end and is available for future Ch6 scene callbacks.

flags.label: Katsuie Loyalty
flags.description: Tracks Katsuie's accumulated loyalty from Ch2 council and road scenes. Affects Ch2 chapter-end dialogue register. Reserved for future chapters.

flags.label: Bond Strength
flags.description: Companion mechanic flag. Incremented when the player treats companions with deliberate care — welcoming Mitsuhide warmly (Ch1), accepting Ieyasu's full terms (Ch2), riding in silence with Nohime (Ch3), sending Mitsuhide to negotiate (Ch3), Ranmaru present at Honnoji (Ch7), S02_LOYAL fires (Ch8). Max 6 before Ch5 addition. Threshold ≥3 unlocks deeper narrator beats in Ch6 S01; ≥4 unlocks Ch8 S04_BATTLE and S05_WIN companion codas.

flags.label: Weapon Legacy
flags.description: Equipment mechanic flag. Incremented each time Nobunaga accepts or keeps a significant weapon: blade retrieved (Ch1 S06A), mystery gift accepted (Ch2 S06 micro-beat), Katsuie's weapon received (Ch4), reforged Nagashino blade accepted (Ch5 S18A). Max 4. Threshold ≥2 unlocks Kenshin's 'you carry things' line in Ch5 S04; ≥3 arms the named-weapon narrator beat in Ch8 S03B. weapon_legacy=0 on any Ch8 path triggers the 'travels light' alternative.

flags.label: Omen Read
flags.description: Pet mechanic flag. Incremented when Nobunaga pays attention to things outside the campaign: fox at the armory (Ch1 S06A), roadside omen with Nohime after Dosan (Ch3 S05A), Kenshin honest-assessment reception (Ch5 S03C) or blade-acknowledgement (Ch5 S05A). Max 3. Threshold ≥2 changes how Kenshin's 'tools break' warning is delivered in Ch5 S04 (personal vs general) and adds a premonition narrator beat to Ch8 S01.

flags.label: Road Command
flags.description: Stable mechanic flag. Incremented when Nobunaga invests in movement and mounted logistics: horse named after Okehazama (Ch1 S09_WIN), war-horse presence at Nobuyasu standoff (Ch2 S05A), lending stable horse to Mitsuhide (Ch4 mid-scene), mounted at garrison battle (Ch7 S08_BATTLE). Max 4. Threshold ≥3 unlocks a logistics-reflection narrator beat in Ch7 S09_WIN and S09_WIN_LOYAL, and the Okehazama horse callback in Ch8 S05_WIN.
